problem:
Evaluate
\[\begin{vmatrix} y + 1 & y & y \\ y & y + 1 & y \\ y & y & y + 1 \end{vmatrix}.\]

classified_questions.question: What is the first step in evaluating the determinant of this matrix?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can we expand the determinant using the properties of determinants?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you explain how we can expand the determinant using cofactor expansion along the first row?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the determinant of a 2x2 matrix? How can we apply that here?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: What properties of determinants can we use to simplify the expanded determinant expression?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you verify the final result matches the one obtained by expanding the determinant directly?
classified_questions.label: b
